_comment: Stock Watcher Pro — Configuration File. Edit these settings to customize your experience.
_timezone_note: Your local timezone. Briefing times are converted from ET to this timezone. Use IANA format (e.g., America/Chicago, America/Denver, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London).

pre_market._note: Local time. Default 6:00 AM — gives you time to read before the 9:30 AM ET open.

mid_day._note: Eastern Time. Catches the midday pulse.

post_market._note: Eastern Time. Right after the close.

alert_thresholds._filing_note: Impact score (1-10) that triggers an immediate alert instead of waiting for the next briefing. Default 7 = material events only.
alert_thresholds._thesis_note: Alert when a thesis status changes (e.g., bullish → weakening). Set to false to only see thesis changes in briefings.
alert_thresholds._insider_note: Minimum dollar value of insider transactions (Form 4) to include in briefings. Filters out routine small grants.

edgar_settings._interval_note: How often to check EDGAR for new filings during market hours. Default every 2 hours.
edgar_settings._forms_note: SEC form types to monitor. 8-K (current events), 10-K (annual), 10-Q (quarterly), 4 (insider trades), DEF 14A (proxy).
edgar_settings._rate_note: Milliseconds between EDGAR API requests. SEC requires max 10 req/sec. 500ms is conservative and safe.
edgar_settings._email_note: SEC requires a valid contact email in the User-Agent header. Set this to your email address.

source_settings._rediscovery_note: How often to re-run source discovery for each ticker. Default monthly.
source_settings._health_note: Day of week to run source health checks (verify URLs still work, update quality scores).
source_settings._quality_note: Sources below this score are flagged for removal. Scale is 0-100.

display_preferences._format_note: Options: 'structured' (emoji headers, sections) or 'compact' (dense paragraph style).
display_preferences._competitor_note: Include competitor news in briefings. Set to false if you only want direct holdings coverage.
display_preferences._max_note: Maximum news items per ticker in each briefing. Keeps briefings scannable.
